title: Miracle-Gro EverGreen Shady Lawn Seed 420 g - 14 m2
features: Quality grass seed for shady and dry lawns
Contains Distinct Watersmart for optimum water absorption
Contains a mixture of fescues including hard fecues and brown top bent
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Thrives in shade A unique mix of sports-grade seed, specially selected to create a dense lawn in shady/dry areas. Thicker, healthier lawn A drought tolerant lawn seed helps create a thicker, healthier grass in shady areas. For strong grass roots Miracle-Gro Shady Lawn Seed grows strong roots for optimum absorption of water and nutrients. Pet and child friendly Exceeds stringent regulations and is suitable for use in areas where children and pets have access. Next page 1 Thrives In Shade 2 Thicker, Healthier Lawn 3 For Strong Grass Roots 4 Pet & Child Friendly Ideal for creating new lawns, overseeding, repairing bare patches in shady areas Every lawn has an area affected by shade, whether it is under trees, hedges or beside walls or fences. This mix of shade tolerant seeds allows the grass to thrive and maintain a great appearance across the whole lawn; in both shady and non-shady areas. Contains Watersmart grass technology which grows strong roots for optimum absorption of water and nutrients. Why should I use Miracle-Gro Shady Lawn Seed? Miracle-Gro Shady Lawn Seed is a grass seed that thrives in shady areas This specialist mix of shady lawn seeds can be used to cover the whole lawn not just shady areas. Apply using either a hand held or wheeled Miracle-Gro spreader. Where can I use Miracle-Gro Shady Lawn Seed? Miracle-Gro Shady Lawn Seed is ideal for creating a new lawn, over-seeding or repairing bare patches in shady areas. When should I use Miracle-Gro Shady Lawn Seed? Use March to early October. Can be applied in spring once frost has passed. Under ideal conditions, grass will start to appear from 7 days. How do I use Miracle-Gro Shady Lawn Seed? Rake the area to remove all weeds, stones or dead grass. Shake the box to mix the seeds. Using the handy sprinkler on the side of pack, sow a criss-cross pattern of seeds onto the soil. Gently rake in and tread seeds into soil, then water in.
